Trust is not just a word for us;

About Us

TecPoint Global Solution Ltd. (TPGS) is an emerging Information and Communications Technology Company, dedicated to providing array of services across enterprises, small-medium businesses and residents with state of art Technology.

We deliver world-class Connectivity Solution, Managed IT Solution and Broadband that delight customers and technology that powers the future of Nigeria.

The founder members at TecPoint Global collectively bring around 40 Years of diversified international experience in fast-paced, time sensitive environment encompassing Telecommunications & ICT, Smart Solutions, AI and Operations Management.

TecPoint Global is focused on empowering people’s life through Smart Innovative Technology, both at home and at work. The robust technology solutions empower companies and individuals with greater value and growth, ultimately raising the living standards of Corporates and Communities in Nigeria.

  • Integrated Solutions Provider
  • Telecom Solutions
  • ICT Services
  • Financial Technology
  • Digital Marketing Solutions
  • Operations Optimization
PLANS
About us
Empowering Communities with Smart Technology

Why Choose TecPoint Global Solutions?

With decades of diversified international experience, we stand out through our commitment to innovation, reliability, and customer satisfaction. Whether you need enterprise connectivity or smart city solutions, our team is dedicated to transforming your technological needs into real-world solutions. Trusted by businesses across Nigeria, we deliver exceptional value with every project.

Key Benefits of Choosing TecPoint Global Solutions:

Over 40 Years of Combined International Experience & PAN Coverage Across Nigeria:

founders bring unparalleled expertise in Telecommunications, ICT, and Operations Management, ensuring top-notch service delivery.

Innovative, Tailored Solutions:

We design customized solutions that fit your specific needs, driving productivity and convenience.

Affordability:

Our solutions are priced competitively, providing great value without compromising on quality.

Fast and Reliable Internet:

Enjoy high-speed internet with guaranteed performance, ensuring smooth and uninterrupted connectivity.

No Data Caps:

Experience unlimited internet access without worrying about data limits, allowing you to stay connected as much as you need.

Technology-Driven Approach:

We turn advanced technology into practical, everyday solutions that enhance your living and working environment.

Reliable Customer Service and Technical Support:

Our dedicated team is always ready to assist, ensuring you receive prompt and effective support whenever needed.

Client Testimonials

TecPoint Global Solutions has exceeded my expectations with their reliable internet connectivity and excellent customer support team. I am very satisfied with their services and would highly recommend them to others. Everything about their service is simply outstanding!

I am very pleased with my internet connection from TecPoint Global Solutions. Their connectivity is top-notch, and their customer support team is exceptional. I would highly recommend their services to others. Thank you for providing such excellent service straight to our home!

I am highly satisfied with the services provided by TecPoint Global Solutions. Their internet connectivity is reliable and of excellent quality, complemented by an outstanding customer support team. I would gladly recommend their services to others.

TecPoint Global Solutions has consistently delivered exceptional internet services, characterized by reliability and high performance. We are confident that TecPoint Global Solutions is an organization to be recommended.

TecPoint Global Solutions has proven to be a trusted partner in providing reliable and high-quality internet connectivity. We highly recommend TecPoint Global Solutions for their exceptional commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.
